title: Blue Style CPVP Pack 16x
description: This is a Minecraft Texture pack made for cpvp it contains Crystals and other in a blue style
body: This Pack adds Follwing Things recolored Blocks recolored Items new item Models everything in a blue Style If you want a new experience while playing and like the color blue this is a great texturepack for you ! it revamps the color of the Crystal pvp Items and gives them a new look
